summary: Rebuilt worksheets WS1–WS11 as pure evidence-collection bundles. Each deployed worksheet (WS1, WS3, WS4, WS5, WS6, WS7, WS10, WS11) contains five files with rubric, extraction schema, behaviour opportunities (OB_* only), validity notes, and answer key. WS2, WS8, WS9 are scaffolded as not_deployed. No ILO, Domain, or AI-CFT mappings appear in worksheet bundles.
remaining_risks: WS5 optional row 6 (B21–B24) is in extraction fields but not separately scored in rubric; behaviour engine must aggregate at cell level if row scoring is insufficient.
WS6 tree spatial layout is only partially captured by 13 OCR fields; validity threat documented but not mitigated in OCR pipeline yet.
WS7 Part 1 uses fixed sample tree while Part 2 depends on WS6; cross-worksheet consistency validation is not yet wired into pipeline.
Legacy rubrics/ and mappings/ directories remain for backward compatibility; pipeline still references mappings/ for portfolio rollup until behaviour engine milestone.
JSON Schema validation uses structural validators in validate_worksheet_bundles.py; full jsonschema draft validation against schema/*.schema.json is not yet automated.
WS_DT (plugged/CODAP phase) is out of scope for this milestone.
files_created: worksheets/WS2 through WS11 (5 files each, 55 bundle artifacts total)
